overview.short: Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple is a holy Hindu religious site in the village of Agaram Agraharam in Hosur taluk of Krishnagiri district in the Indian stat
overview.description: Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple is a holy Hindu religious site in the village of Agaram Agraharam in Hosur taluk of Krishnagiri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located 15 km from Hosur on Rayakotta Road and 65 km from Bangalore. Hosur is a rapidly growing industrial hub as well as a famous pilgrimage centre, and is also known as Dakshina Kashi ("Southern Kashi"), since the town is surrounded by the three hills of Shiva, Vishnu and Brahma, which are not seen anywhere else in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (71 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur?
faq.a: Stays in Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Advanapalli, Agaram Agraharam, Ayaranapalli, Anchettidurgam, Halekotta.
